name: Strats Trust Wal Mart Stores Inc. STRT CTF 05-4
summary: Strats Trust Wal Mart Stores Inc. STRT CTF 05-4 is a unit investment trust holding securities related to Wal Mart Stores Inc., distributing income to its unitholders. The trust was formed in 2005 and is managed by a financial institution. It's a fixed-income investment vehicle focused on a specific company.
